name: [GRV-API] Database Connection Pool Exhaustion
message:
Database connection pool nearing exhaustion for grv-api service.

Environment: {{env}}
Service: {{service}}
Active Connections: {{value}}% of max pool

Actions Required:
1. Check for connection leaks
2. Review slow queries
3. Consider increasing pool size
4. Optimize database queries

Investigate: https://app.datadoghq.com/infrastructure/database/postgresql

options.escalation_message: Database connection pool critically high. Service performance severely impacted.
